title: Slime-snake
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Slime-snakes''' were [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] creatures native to [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]]. Their scales were glossed in a viscous slime which repelled parasites and most other predators.<ref name="Emp8">[[Empire 8|''Empire'' 8]]</ref>

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 8|''Empire'' 8]] {{Mo}}
